title: claytonia granulifera
intro: Claytonia granulifera, also known as the small-flowered springbeauty, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Portulacaceae family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, stems, and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Claytonia granulifera include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve digestion, and support eye health. Claytonia granulifera can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
